title: saussurea uliginosa var. uliginosa
intro: Saussurea uliginosa var. uliginosa, also known as Marsh Club Moss or Western Yarrow, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
